testcase.name: test_service_desk_attach_or_create_ticket_endpoint_exists

failure.message: AssertionError: Expected 200/201, got 500: Internal Server Error assert 500 in [200, 201] + where 500 = <Response [500]>.status_code

testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_go_pillar_200.py:47: in test_service_desk_attach_or_create_ticket_endpoint_exists assert response.status_code in [200, 201], f"Expected 200/201, got {response.status_code}: {response.text}" E AssertionError: Expected 200/201, got 500: Internal Server Error E assert 500 in [200, 201] E + where 500 = <Response [500]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_pets_endpoint_returns_pet_data
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_go_pillar_200.py:288: in test_pets_endpoint_returns_pet_data assert pets_response.status_code == 200, f"Get pets failed: {pets_response.text}" E AssertionError: Get pets failed: {"detail":"Could not validate credentials"} E assert 401 == 200 E + where 401 = <Response [401]>.status_code
